title: the user can request to clone or pull all or a subset of the repos to a given dir
description: the user can give some name pattern or last modified date or whatever filter is possible through the github api to fetch repos; clone, if the repo does not exists or fetch/pull if the repo already exists; if the repo is dirty, just leave it, and inform the user, but do not fail; try to be a best-effort tool

title: a gh-repos go tool to fetch or update repositories hosted on github
description: the tool should be called gh-repos and should be written in Go, a single file, easy to compile; add also unit tests

title: indicate private repos
description: as with fork icon, use another icon to indicate a private repository; the icon can be subtle and calm

title: get full list of repos
description: it seems that currently, only public repos are listed; if possible list private repos as well

title: allow the user to just list all repos by name and description (if any)
description: a subcommand to just list repos by name; the api call could be cached, as repos do not change that often; there could be a flag, e.g. -f to force a new download if the new request is within the ttl

title: the output of list should be formatted
description: the list command outputs all repos, but we could use something like stdlib tabwriter to make is a bit more reabable; also make sure that descriptions do not exceed the available line length of the current terminal window width

title: make the listing more aligned and also add a small icon to indicate a fork

title: when using less, the output should not be overly truncated
description: first, when running without piping into less, the output may wrap around the line, so it needs to be a bit shorter; on the other hand, when piping the output into less, the description column gets truncated too much; ideally when piping into less, the output stays the same width as without less

title: list all github repos for a user
description: the user has a GITHUB_TOKEN token to access the API and the github api can be used to list all repos for a user
